fields.title: Summon Choices
fields.description: List of spells for the mob to use to summon entities.

fields.title: Cast Duration
fields.description: Time in seconds the spell casting will take.

fields.title: Cooldown Time
fields.description: Time in seconds the mob has to wait before using the spell again.

fields.title: Do Casting
fields.description: If true, the mob will do the casting animations and render spell particles.

fields.title: Filters
fields.description: Conditions that must be met for this summon choice to be valid.

fields.title: Max Activation Range
fields.description: Upper bound of the activation distance in blocks for this spell.

fields.title: Min Activation Range
fields.description: Lower bound of the activation distance in blocks for this spell.

fields.title: Particle Color
fields.description: The color of the particles for this spell. Can be an integer (ARGB) or a hex string like '#AARRGGBB'.

fields.title: Sequence
fields.description: List of summon steps for the spell.

fields.title: Base Delay
fields.description: Delay in seconds before this step starts.

fields.title: Delay Per Summon
fields.description: Delay in seconds between each entity summon.

fields.title: Entity Type
fields.description: The entity type to summon.

fields.title: Num Entities Spawned
fields.description: Number of entities to spawn in this step.

fields.title: Shape
fields.description: Shape of the summon pattern: 'circle' or 'line'.

fields.title: Size
fields.description: Size of the summon pattern.

fields.title: Sound Event
fields.description: Sound event to play when summoning.

fields.title: Summon Cap
fields.description: Maximum number of entities that can be summoned.

fields.title: Summon Cap Radius
fields.description: Radius to check for existing summoned entities.

fields.title: Target
fields.description: Target for the summon: 'self' or 'other'.

fields.title: Start Sound Event
fields.description: Sound event to play when casting starts.

fields.title: Weight
fields.description: Relative weight for random selection among summon choices.

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

description: Allows the mob to attack the player by summoning other entities.
title: Summon Entity Behavior
